name: Colorful Times - Further optimization for performance and efficiency

asi.hypothesis: Apply modern Neovim async patterns for zero-blocking startup
asi.summary: Deferred all blocking I/O (state.load, autocmds, timers, colorscheme) via vim.defer_fn(0)

description: Fix macOS system background detection timing issue with debouncing

asi.hypothesis: Add debouncing and verification delay for macOS defaults command to handle stale cache values after system toggle
changes: Added 100ms cache to avoid rapid repeated checks
Added debounce timer for value changes
Added 100ms delay verification when value changes to handle macOS defaults cache inconsistency

name: Optimizing next_change_at for O(log n) with precomputed boundary table

description: Precompute sorted boundary table for O(log n) next_change_at lookup

asi.hypothesis: Binary search on precomputed boundaries should be faster than linear scan for larger schedules
results: No regression for small schedules (2 entries: 0.014 µs/call unchanged)
asi.complexity: O(log n) vs O(n) for boundary lookup
